name: Mountain Eye
short_description: The protagonist returns to their hometown due to the relocation of their grandfather's grave. During a day spent in their former home, an extraordinary event occurs.
detailed_description:
The protagonist returns to their hometown due to the relocation of their grandfather's grave. During a day spent in their former home, an extraordinary event occurs.

Mountain Eyes is a narrative-driven walking simulator. As players progress, conversations with an unexpected guest trigger vivid memories, leading the protagonist to gradually recall their childhood.

Item Interaction
Interact with various objects in the house to learn about their history.

Walking Simulator
When boredom sets in, special events unfold.
